name: whisper
title: Whisper - Share Secrets
description: Share passwords, API keys, and private notes securely. Whisper creates encrypted links that expire or self-destruct after viewing.
author: quentinved

commands.name: whisper
commands.title: Whisper
commands.subtitle: Whisper
commands.description: Quickly create an encrypted secret link

commands.name: whisper-form
commands.title: Create Secret
commands.subtitle: Whisper
commands.description: Create an encrypted secret link with a form

preferences.name: serverUrl
preferences.title: Whisper Server URL
preferences.description: URL of the Whisper server (for self-hosted instances)

tools.name: create-secret
tools.title: Create Secret Link
tools.description: Create an encrypted, expiring link for sharing a secret securely

evals.input: @create-secret Create a secret link for my-api-key and copy it to the clipboard.
@create-secret Create a secret for "my-api-key" that expires in 24h and can be viewed multiple times.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
